name: Rose Petal Dream
description: A gentle, moisturizing soap infused with real rose petals and rose essential oil. Leaves skin soft and delicately scented.
descCn: 溫和保濕的手工皂，融入真正的玫瑰花瓣和玫瑰精油，讓肌膚柔嫩細滑。

name: Lavender Serenity
description: Calming lavender soap with dried lavender buds. Perfect for unwinding after a long day.
descCn: 鎮靜的薰衣草手工皂，搭配乾燥薰衣草花苞，適合疲憊一天後的放鬆時光。

name: Honey & Oat Glow
description: Nourishing honey and oatmeal soap that gently exfoliates and hydrates. A warm, sweet treat for your skin.
descCn: 滋養的蜂蜜燕麥皂，溫和去角質同時保濕，為肌膚帶來溫暖甜蜜的呵護。

name: Ocean Breeze
description: Refreshing sea mineral soap with a crisp, clean scent that invigorates the senses.
descCn: 清新的海洋礦物皂，帶有清爽乾淨的香氣，喚醒您的感官。

name: Sakura Blossom Melt
description: Delicate cherry blossom scented wax melt adorned with dried pink flowers. Fills your space with spring.
descCn: 精緻的櫻花香蠟片，點綴乾燥粉色花朵，讓您的空間充滿春天氣息。

name: Vanilla Chai Melt
description: Warm vanilla and spice wax melt that creates a cozy, inviting atmosphere in any room.
descCn: 溫暖的香草與香料蠟片，為任何房間營造舒適溫馨的氛圍。

name: Eucalyptus Mint Melt
description: Crisp eucalyptus and cool mint wax melt for a spa-like experience at home.
descCn: 清新的尤加利和涼薄荷蠟片，在家也能享受水療般的體驗。

name: Autumn Pumpkin
description: Adorable pumpkin-shaped soy wax candle with warm cinnamon and spice notes. A cozy autumn essential on marble display.
descCn: 可愛的南瓜造型大豆蠟蠟燭，帶有溫暖的肉桂和香料調。秋日必備的溫馨擺設。

name: Golden Hour
description: A soy wax candle with amber and sandalwood notes, topped with dried botanicals. Burns for 40+ hours.
descCn: 大豆蠟蠟燭，帶有琥珀和檀香調，頂部裝飾乾燥植物，可燃燒40小時以上。

name: Moonlit Garden
description: Jasmine and white tea candle with pressed flowers. A dreamy scent for quiet evenings.
descCn: 茉莉花和白茶蠟燭，搭配壓花裝飾，為寧靜夜晚帶來夢幻香氣。

name: Maple Leaf Melt
description: Autumn-inspired maple leaf shaped wax melt with warm amber and dried leaf accents. The perfect fall decoration.
descCn: 秋季靈感的楓葉造型蠟片，帶有溫暖的琥珀香和乾燥葉片裝飾，完美的秋日擺設。

name: Mooncake Candle Gift Box
description: Mid-Autumn Festival special — four beautifully detailed mooncake-shaped candles with a bunny figure, presented in an elegant black gift box with a heart card.
descCn: 中秋節特別版——四個精緻月餅造型蠟燭搭配兔子擺件，裝在典雅黑色禮盒中，附心形賀卡。

name: Self-Care Bundle
description: A curated gift set with one soap, one wax melt, and one candle — beautifully wrapped and ready to give.
descCn: 精心策劃的禮盒，包含一塊手工皂、一片蠟片和一支蠟燭，精美包裝，送禮首選。

name: Floral Bliss Bundle
description: Our premium gift set featuring three soaps and two wax melts in a handcrafted wooden box.
descCn: 我們的高級禮盒，包含三塊手工皂和兩片蠟片，裝在手工木盒中。
